label: Paged attention & KV-memory management

node.label: Paged attention & KV-memory management
node.definition: Paged attention manages key–value cache blocks through virtual-memory-like allocation so variable-length generations share accelerator memory efficiently.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Paged attention & KV-memory management is to connect Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling, KV cache & recurrent inference state to downstream capabilities including Large language models, Conversational assistants & chatbots.
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling, KV cache & recurrent inference state.

dependencies.rationale: Paged attention & KV-memory management turns Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Paged attention & KV-memory management turns KV cache & recurrent inference state into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
Paged attention & KV-memory management turns Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.

sentence_units.text: Paged attention manages key–value cache blocks through virtual-memory-like allocation so variable-length generations share accelerator memory efficiently.

The role of Paged attention & KV-memory management is to connect Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling, KV cache & recurrent inference state to downstream capabilities including Large language models, Conversational assistants & chatbots.

Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling, KV cache & recurrent inference state.
Paged attention & KV-memory management turns Batching, admission control & GPU scheduling into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.

Paged attention & KV-memory management turns Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention into a scalable, deployable, observable, or integrity-preserving capability.
